text: These dimly-lit, futuristic surroundings fill me with a quiet curiosity. The empty room beyond the glass and the glowing screens evoke a sense of being on the threshold of discovery. I feel a mix of anticipation and isolation—caught between the sterile hush of technology and the human desire for purpose and understanding. The "R+D" on the wall reminds me how the pursuit of knowledge and innovation can be both thrilling and a little lonely.
